sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32783" key="e)/kptusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκπτῠσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32783.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">expectoration,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἵματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
